name: game-create
_note: game-design.game-create is a LENS_ACTIONS handler (server/domains/gamedesign.js, default export registerGameDesignActions; HYPHENATED domain 'game-design' registered from the non-hyphen file via server/domains/index.js PATH 3). It is reached ONLY via /api/lens/run dispatch (server.js:39150, handler(ctx, virtualArtifact, input)), reading params from the 3rd arg. DETERMINISTIC + in-memory (globalThis._concordSTATE.gameDesignLens Maps, per-user keyed by ctx.actor.userId) — no DB, no LLM, no network. A blank/absent title rejects ('game title required'); title/genre/platform are length-clamped via gdClean so an XSS probe string is stored inert and bounded, never executed. Because no derived MACROS contract exists for this LENS_ACTIONS macro, the macro-assassin's enumerateMacros(MACROS) pipeline does NOT drive this override (base lookup at macro-assassin.mjs:98 is undefined → skipped); it is authored as a behavioral spec + pinned by server/tests/game-design-lens-macros.test.js.
